name: Humanitix Event Ticketing Platform
description: Full-service event ticketing and registration platform. Booking fees go entirely to education charities rather than to shareholders.

name: Patagonia Apparel
description: Outdoor and activewear clothing line. All profits flow to environmental nonprofit Holdfast Collective.

name: Patagonia Outdoor Gear
description: Backpacks, sleeping bags, climbing gear, and other outdoor equipment. All profits flow to environmental causes via the Patagonia Purpose Trust.

name: One for the World Pledge Program
description: Structured giving pledge program helping individuals commit to donating 1%+ of income to highly effective charities.

name: Good Store
description: Online shop selling socks, soap, coffee, eco cleaning products, and merchandise from multiple impact brands. All profits from every purchase go directly to charity. Brands include Awesome Socks Club, Sun Basin Soap, Keats & Co., and EcoGeek.

name: Awesome Socks Club Subscription
description: Monthly subscription delivering artist-designed socks and underwear. 100% of profits fund Partners in Health's Maternal Center of Excellence in Sierra Leone. Individual items also available without subscription.

name: Who Gives a Crap Toilet Paper & Paper Products
description: Bamboo and recycled-material toilet paper, paper towels, and tissues. 50% of profits fund sanitation and hygiene projects globally, with a focus on building toilets in the developing world.

name: Newman's Own Food Products
description: Salad dressings, pasta sauces, snacks, beverages, and pet food sold in supermarkets nationwide. All after-tax profits are donated to Newman's Own Foundation and distributed to thousands of charities.

name: Waking Up App
description: Meditation and philosophy app offering guided meditations, theory lessons, and mindfulness courses. Subscriptions support an app that pledges at least 10% of profits to effective charities.

name: 3Dtotal Art Books & Tutorials
description: Art education books, digital tutorials, and reference resources for concept artists, illustrators, and 3D artists. Purchasing supports a company that donates 50% of profits to effective charities.

name: Secrid Card Protectors & Wallets
description: Slim wallets and card protectors with a patented aluminium card case mechanism. Protects RFID cards. Made in the Netherlands. Purchasing supports a company pledging at least 10% of net profits to charitable causes.

name: BOAS Sustainable Outdoor Apparel
description: Sustainable outdoor clothing and apparel. Purchasing supports a company pledging at least 90% of distributable profits to effective charities annually.

name: EcoGeek Eco-Friendly Cleaning Products
description: Eco-friendly cleaning products including laundry and dishwashing products. 100% of profits go to coral reef restoration through the Coral Reef Alliance.

name: Keats & Co. Coffee and Tea
description: Coffee and tea subscription products. 100% of profits fund long-term tuberculosis treatment in Lesotho through Partners in Health.

name: Sun Basin Handmade Soaps
description: Handmade soaps. 100% of profits go to Partners in Health funding the Maternal Center of Excellence in Sierra Leone.

name: Give Industries Products and Services
description: Manufacturing products and services. 100% of profits go to effective charities guided by external charity evaluators.

name: Rituals Cosmetics and Wellness Products
description: Cosmetics, skincare, bath and body products, and wellness products. Purchasing supports a brand pledging at least 10% of annual net profits to wellbeing of people and planet.

name: Croxsons Glass Bottles and Packaging
description: Glass bottles and packaging solutions for food and beverage industries. Purchasing supports a company pledging at least 10% of net profits to effective charities.

name: Ecosia Search Engine
description: Free search engine powered by ad revenue. At least 80% of profits go to tree planting projects globally.

name: Impact Books Publications
description: Books published by Impact Books Ltd. Purchasing supports a company donating at least 10% of profits to effective charities.

name: LanguageCourse Online Language School Search
description: Online platform for finding and booking language courses worldwide. Purchasing supports a company pledging at least 10% of profits to effective charities.

name: Toast Ale Craft Beer
description: Range of craft beers brewed with surplus fresh bread from bakeries and sandwich makers. 100% of profits go to charities fighting food waste and climate change.

name: Greyston Bakery Products
description: Baked goods including brownies, cookies, and other items made by open-hire employees. All profits support the Greyston Foundation's community programs in Yonkers, NY.

name: Studio-1X Streetwear
description: Sustainable streetwear apparel. Purchasing supports a GWWC founding Company Pledge member donating at least 10% of profits to effective charities.

name: Innocent Smoothies & Juices
description: Range of smoothies, juices, and coconut water. 10% of annual profits go to the Innocent Foundation, supporting sustainable farming and food security.

name: Belu Water
description: Bottled mineral water and water filtration systems sold to restaurants, cafes, and hospitality venues. 100% of net profits go to WaterAid.

name: Thankyou Personal Care & Household Products
description: Hand wash, shampoo, body wash, deodorant, baby care, and cleaning products sold in Australian and NZ supermarkets. All profit supports the Thankyou Charitable Trust's programs to end extreme poverty.

name: Two Blind Brothers Apparel & Gifts
description: Luxury soft apparel — shirts, hoodies, socks — and gift boxes. 100% of profits go to Foundation Fighting Blindness and community support for blind and visually impaired individuals.

name: Brewgooder Clean Water Lager
description: Scottish craft lager sold in UK supermarkets and bars. 100% of profits go to clean water and sanitation projects in Malawi via partner organizations.

name: Elvis & Kresse Reclaimed Accessories
description: Bags, wallets, belts, and homeware handcrafted from decommissioned fire hoses, leather off-cuts, and other reclaimed materials. 50% of profits donated to charity.

name: TOMS Shoes, Eyewear & Bags
description: Footwear, sandals, boots, eyewear, and bags. One third of annual net profits go to grassroots organizations working on mental health, gun violence prevention, and equal access to opportunity.

name: Awesome Coffee Club Subscription
description: Monthly coffee subscription (beans or grounds) using sustainably sourced coffee from small farmers. 100% of profits fund Partners in Health's Maternal Center of Excellence in Kono District, Sierra Leone. Has raised $7.5M+ for maternal and infant health.

name: Divine Fairtrade Chocolate Bars
description: Fairtrade chocolate bars in milk, dark, and white varieties. Buying Divine means the Kuapa Kokoo cooperative (80,000+ Ghanaian farmers who own 45% of the company) receives dividends and Fairtrade premiums for community development.

name: One Water Bottled Water
description: Bottled water sold in UK restaurants, cafes, and retailers. Profits flow to The One Foundation, funding water, sanitation, and hygiene projects across Sub-Saharan Africa.

name: Liberation Fairtrade Nuts & Nut Butters
description: Fairtrade cashews, almonds, peanuts, mixed nuts, and nut butters sold in UK supermarkets. Purchasing supports a company majority-owned by the smallholder farmers who grow the nuts.

name: Keats & Co. Loose-Leaf Tea & Coffee
description: Loose-leaf tea and specialty coffee beans. 100% of profits go to Partners in Health for long-term tuberculosis treatment in Lesotho.

name: Tony's Chocolonely Chocolate Bars
description: Chocolate bars in milk, dark, and white varieties. Tony's pays farmers living-income premiums, donates 1% of annual revenue to the Chocolonely Foundation, and deliberately keeps near-zero profit to keep value upstream with cocoa farmers.

name: Better World Books Used & New Books
description: Used and new books across all genres. 5% of net revenues donated to literacy charities (buyer's choice). Books sourced partly from library donations, with 15% of net price returned to contributing libraries.

name: Bombas Socks, Underwear & T-Shirts
description: Premium comfort socks, underwear, and t-shirts. For every item purchased, an equivalent item is donated to shelters and community organizations serving people experiencing homelessness.

name: Warby Parker Glasses & Sunglasses
description: Prescription eyeglasses and sunglasses sold direct-to-consumer. Every pair purchased triggers the donation of a pair to someone in need in a developing country through VisionSpring-trained vision entrepreneurs.

name: GoalsWon Accountability Coaching
description: Accountability coaching app matching users with trained coaches for weekly check-ins. For every paid subscription, one free subscription is provided to a person doing high-impact work at an EA-aligned organization.

name: Altruistic Agency Web & Tech Services
description: Web development, software engineering, IT security, and tech support services. Provided free to high-impact nonprofits and charities. Work spans website builds, custom applications, and security auditing.

name: Scarlet Spark Strategy & Org Health Consulting
description: Free strategy, organizational health, people operations, and leadership consulting for animal advocacy charities. Engagements cover strategic planning, team health, and leadership development.

name: Good Impressions Digital Marketing
description: Paid advertising (Google, Meta), SEO, and web analytics services for EA-aligned nonprofits. Fees are subsidized by grants from Longview Philanthropy and Open Philanthropy so high-impact projects are not excluded by cost.

name: Beneficial State Bank — Business & Nonprofit Banking
description: Business checking, savings, loans, and nonprofit banking services. Majority-owned by a nonprofit foundation; zero fossil-fuel, private-prison, or weapons lending; over 90% of lending in positive-impact sectors (affordable housing, small business, health, environment).
